tasks.title: Planning Registration Guard
tasks.description: Introduce a foundational guard that checks whether active planning artifacts (blueprints, roadmap docs, planning specs, status reports) are registered in task-control or roadmap. CI runs report-only; blocking/ratchet remains deliberately deferred.
missing_evidence: Ratchet/Baseline-Modus für neue Findings fehlt noch.
CI ist report-only angebunden; blocking/ratchet bleibt bewusst ausstehend.
